title: Withering AI Tweaks
description: Allows Withering Heights to work with Mob AI Tweaks' Wither rework
body:
Note:

-If you are planning to use the datapack version of Withering Heights, only install the resource pack provided by the developer of the datapack.

-If you are already using the datapack version of Withering Heights, be sure to delete it and place this one.

This datapack simply patches Withering Heights to let it work with Mob AI Tweaks' Wither changes.

Supports enraged, crazy mode, and enraged crazy mode Wither!

Also moves the "To the Beginning" advancement added by Withering Heights to be after "Decade of Decay"
